info.title: OmniBus Blockchain JSON-RPC 2.0 API
info.description: Complete RPC specification for OmniBus blockchain node. 97 endpoints covering crypto, chain, wallet, exchange, agents, governance.

post.description: All blockchain operations via JSON-RPC 2.0. No HTTP basic auth required on localhost (unsafe). Production uses HMAC-SHA512.

500.description: RPC error (method not found, invalid params, internal error)

code.description: -32700: Parse error, -32600: Invalid Request, -32601: Method not found, -32602: Invalid params, -32603: Internal error

reward.description: Block reward in SAT (1e9 SAT = 1 OMNI)

x-methods.description: Complete list of RPC methods. Call via JSON-RPC 2.0 POST to / endpoint.

methods.name: getblockcount
methods.description: Get current block height
methods.returns: integer (block height)

methods.name: getblock
methods.description: Get block by height or hash
methods.returns: Block object

methods.name: sendtx
methods.description: Broadcast signed transaction

params.name: tx
params.description: Signed transaction object with sig field

methods.returns: { txid: string, status: 'accepted'|'pending'|'rejected', error?: string }

methods.name: getbalance
methods.description: Get address balance
methods.returns: integer (balance in SAT)

methods.name: listunspent
methods.description: List unspent outputs for address(es)
methods.returns: array[UTXO]

methods.name: pq_listSchemes
methods.description: List all post-quantum signature schemes supported
methods.returns: array[{ scheme: string, code: integer, address_prefix: string }]

methods.name: getrichlist
methods.description: Get top N addresses by balance
methods.returns: { entries: array[Address], total: integer, shown: integer, totalSupply: integer }

methods.name: dns_register
methods.description: Register a .omnibus or .arbitraje name (via TX op_return ns_claim:)
methods.returns: { name: string, owner: string, expiry_block: integer, tx_hash: string }
methods.note: Requires TX with op_return='ns_claim:name.tld' and fee transfer

methods.name: dns_lookup
methods.description: Resolve name to owner address
methods.returns: { name: string, owner: string, expiry_block: integer } or null if not found

methods.name: exchange_getbalances
methods.description: Get multi-asset portfolio (real or paper)
methods.returns: { mode: string, assets: { BTC: {balance, hold}, USD: {balance, hold}, ... } }

methods.name: exchange_getOpenOrders
methods.description: List open orders
methods.returns: array[{ ordertxid, refid, userref, status, opentm, starttm, expirtm, descr, vol, vol_exec, cost, fee, price, stopprice, ... }]

methods.name: exchange_addOrder
methods.description: Place buy/sell order
methods.returns: { descr: { order: string }, txid: [string] }

methods.name: agent_list
methods.description: List all active AI agents
methods.returns: array[{ id: string, tier: string, kind: string, balance: integer, active_orders: integer }]

methods.name: agent_execute
methods.description: Trigger manual agent execution
methods.returns: { agent_id: string, action: string, result: string, timestamp: integer }

methods.name: staking_lock
methods.description: Stake OMNI to become validator
methods.returns: { address: string, stake: integer, tier: string, effective_block: integer }
methods.note: Must send stake via TX, RPC confirms registration

methods.name: governance_getVotes
methods.description: Get active governance proposals + vote status
methods.returns: array[{ proposal_id: integer, title: string, votes_for: integer, votes_against: integer, deadline_block: integer, ... }]

methods.name: governance_castVote
methods.description: Vote on proposal
methods.returns: { proposal_id: integer, voter: string, vote: string, weight: integer, tx_hash: string }

methods.name: reputation_getStatus
methods.description: Get address reputation across 4 tiers (LOVE/FOOD/RENT/VACATION)
methods.returns: { address: string, love: integer, food: integer, rent: integer, vacation: integer, badge: string }
methods.note: Reputation is soulbound (non-transferable). Ranges 0-100 per tier. 100/100/100/100 = Satoshi badge.

methods.name: oracle_getPrice
methods.description: Get price feed for pair
methods.returns: { pair: string, price: number, timestamp: integer, sources: integer, median: true }

methods.name: gettransaction
methods.description: Get TX details by hash
methods.returns: Transaction object (with block_height, confirmations)

methods.name: estimatefee
methods.description: Estimate fee for TX of given size
methods.returns: { fee_per_byte: integer, estimated_fee: integer, urgency: string }

methods.name: help
methods.description: Get help on RPC method
methods.returns: string (help text) or object with all methods

methods.name: getinfo
methods.description: Get node info (version, chain, sync status)
methods.returns: { version: string, chain: 'mainnet'|'testnet'|'regtest', height: integer, sync: boolean, peers: integer, difficulty: integer }

methods.name: getlatestblock
methods.description: Get latest block header (lightweight, no TX list)
methods.returns: { index: integer, timestamp: integer, hash: string, previousHash: string, nonce: integer, txCount: integer }

methods.name: getblocks
methods.description: Get a range of blocks by height
methods.returns: array[Block]

methods.name: getblockchaininfo
methods.description: Node info: version, chain, sync status
methods.returns: { version: string, chain: string, height: integer, sync: boolean, peers: integer, difficulty: integer }

methods.name: getchainmetrics
methods.description: High-level dashboard stats: supply, addresses, validators, mempool, peers, block reward
methods.returns: { height: integer, tipHash: string, totalSupply: integer, addressesWithBalance: integer, validators: integer, validatorSetSize: integer, minValidatorBalance: integer, mempoolSize: integer, peerCount: integer, currentBlockReward: integer, satPerOmni: integer }

methods.name: getstatus
methods.description: Quick node health check: status, blockCount, mempoolSize, wallet address/balance
methods.returns: { status: 'running', blockCount: integer, mempoolSize: integer, address: string, balance: integer }

methods.name: getmempoolsize
methods.description: Number of transactions in the mempool
methods.returns: integer

methods.name: getmempoolstats
methods.description: Detailed mempool statistics
methods.returns: { count: integer, size_bytes: integer, min_fee: integer, max_fee: integer }

methods.name: gettransactions
methods.description: Get transactions for an address (paginated)
methods.returns: array[Transaction]

methods.name: listtransactions
methods.description: List recent transactions by block range or address
methods.returns: array[Transaction]

methods.name: getaddresshistory
methods.description: Full transaction history for an address with sent/received amounts
methods.returns: array[{ txid, from, to, amount, fee, block_height, confirmations, timestamp }]

methods.name: sendtransaction
methods.description: Broadcast a signed transaction (alias: sendtx)

params.name: tx
params.description: Signed TX object with sig field

methods.returns: { txid: string, status: 'accepted'|'pending'|'rejected' }

methods.name: sendrawtransaction
methods.description: Broadcast raw hex-encoded signed transaction
methods.returns: { txid: string, status: string }

methods.name: sendopreturn
methods.description: Send TX with OP_RETURN data (used for name reg, staking, agent commands)
methods.returns: { txid: string, status: string }

methods.name: getnonce
methods.description: Get next usable nonce for an address (accounts for pending mempool TXs)
methods.returns: { address: string, nonce: integer, chainNonce: integer, pendingCount: integer }

methods.name: getaddressbalance
methods.description: Alias for getbalance
methods.returns: integer (balance in SAT)

methods.name: claimfaucet
methods.description: Request testnet OMNI from the faucet. Each address can claim once.
methods.returns: { txid: string, recipient: string, amount: integer, fee: integer, status: 'accepted' }

errors.message: Faucet not enabled on this node

methods.name: getfaucetstatus
methods.description: Check faucet balance, grant amount, and claims served
methods.returns: { enabled: boolean, address: string, balance: integer, grantPerClaim: integer, claimsServed: integer }

methods.name: registername
methods.description: Register a .omnibus (5 OMNI) or .arbitraje (10 OMNI) name
methods.returns: { name, tld, fullLabel, address, registeredAtBlock, fee_paid_sat, fee_txid }

errors.message: Name already taken | fee TX invalid | Invalid name | Reserved name | Per-owner cap exceeded
Signing pubkey does not match owner address
DNS registry not enabled on this node

methods.name: resolvename
methods.description: Resolve a .omnibus or .arbitraje name to its address
methods.returns: { name, tld, fullLabel, address: string|null, found: boolean }

methods.name: reverseresolvename
methods.description: Find names registered to an address
methods.returns: { address, name: string|null, found: boolean }

methods.name: transfername
methods.description: Transfer name ownership (requires current owner signature)
methods.returns: { name, tld, fullLabel, old_owner, new_owner, transferredAtBlock }

methods.name: updatename
methods.description: Update the resolved address of a name
methods.returns: { name, tld, fullLabel, address, updatedAtBlock }

methods.name: renewname
methods.description: Renew a name before expiry (requires fee TX)
methods.returns: { name, tld, fullLabel, expiresAtBlock }

methods.name: listnames
methods.description: List all active registered names across all TLDs
methods.returns: { entries: [{ name, tld, fullLabel, address, registeredAtBlock, expiresAtBlock }], total: integer }

methods.name: getensfee
methods.description: Query current name registration fees and treasury address
methods.returns: { treasury: string, enforcement: boolean, cost_omnibus_omni: integer, cost_arbitraje_omni: integer }

methods.name: getvalidators
methods.description: Get active validator set with weights and join heights
methods.returns: { count: integer, validators: [{ address, weight, since_height }] }

methods.name: getslotleader
methods.description: Current slot leader (next expected block producer)
methods.returns: { slot: integer, leader: string|null, weight: integer }

methods.name: getstakinginfo
methods.description: Detailed staking info for a validator address
methods.returns: { address, status, total_stake, self_stake, delegated_stake, slash_count, slash_history_count, total_rewards, uptime_pct, blocks_produced, commission_pct }

methods.name: getclockstatus
methods.description: Hardware clock status: wall time, RDTSC cycle counter, bit spectrum
methods.returns: { now_ms: integer, rdtsc: integer, spectrum: string }

methods.name: getslotcalendar
methods.description: Pre-computed next 60 slot assignments
methods.returns: { head_slot, slot_interval_ms, entries: [{ slot_id, leader, expected_arrival_ms, state }] }

methods.name: getminerstats
methods.description: Mining statistics: hash rate, blocks/hour, recent block times
methods.returns: { hash_rate: integer, blocks_per_hour: number, avg_block_time_ms: integer }

methods.name: getminerinfo
methods.description: This node's miner identity and current mining state
methods.returns: { address, mining: boolean, block_template_height: integer }

methods.name: getpoolstats
methods.description: Mining pool stats (if pool mode enabled)
methods.returns: { pool_size: integer, total_shares: integer, top_miners: array }

methods.name: registerminer
methods.description: Register a miner address with the pool
methods.returns: { registered: boolean, address: string, worker: string }

methods.name: getpeers
methods.description: List connected P2P peers
methods.returns: array[{ address, port, node_id, version, height }]

methods.name: getnodelist
methods.description: All known nodes (peers + bootstrap nodes)
methods.returns: array[{ address, port, node_id, last_seen }]

methods.name: getnetworkinfo
methods.description: Network topology statistics
methods.returns: { connections, inbound, outbound, relay_fee, version }

methods.name: getsyncstatus
methods.description: IBD sync progress
methods.returns: { synced: boolean, local_height, peer_height, behind, progress_pct }

methods.name: submitslashevidence
methods.description: Submit double-sign evidence against a validator
methods.returns: { slashed: boolean, validator, slash_amount, height }

methods.name: getslashhistory
methods.description: Get slash events for a validator
methods.returns: array[{ height, reason, amount, timestamp }]

methods.name: getheaders
methods.description: Get block headers (no TX data) for a height range
methods.returns: array[{ height, hash, prev_hash, timestamp, difficulty, nonce }]

methods.name: getmerkleproof
methods.description: Get Merkle proof for a TX inclusion in a block
methods.returns: { txid, block_height, merkle_root, proof: array[string], valid: boolean }

methods.name: getfuturepool
methods.description: Transactions scheduled for future blocks
methods.returns: array[{ txid, target_height, from, to, amount }]

methods.name: getperformance
methods.description: Internal performance counters (RPC latency, block processing time)
methods.returns: { rpc_calls_total, avg_rpc_ms, blocks_processed, avg_block_ms }

methods.name: exchange_listPairs
methods.description: List all supported trading pairs
methods.returns: array[{ id: integer, base: string, quote: string, label: string }]

methods.name: exchange_getOrderbook
methods.description: Top-N bids and asks for a pair
methods.returns: { pairId, bids: [{ orderId, price, amount, remaining, trader, ts }], asks: [...], bestBid, bestAsk, spread, orderCount }
methods.note: Price in micro-USD (1 USD = 1_000_000). Amount/remaining in SAT.

methods.name: exchange_getStats
methods.description: Global DEX summary: total orders, fills, best prices per pair
methods.returns: { mode, totalOrders, bidCount, askCount, trades, pairs: [{ id, label, bestBid, bestAsk, spread, orderCount }] }

methods.name: exchange_getTrades
methods.description: Recent fills (newest first). Up to 256.
methods.returns: array[{ fillId, pairId, price, amount, buyer, seller, buyOrderId, sellOrderId, ts }]

methods.name: exchange_placeOrder
methods.description: Place a signed limit order on the native DEX
methods.returns: { mode, orderId, txHash, side, pairId, price, amount, filled, remaining, status, fees: { networkFeeSat, exchangeTakerFeeMicroUsd, exchangeMakerFeeMicroUsd, takerBps, makerBps } }
methods.note: Use signature='REST_HMAC_BYPASS' for HMAC-authenticated REST layer calls. status: filled|partial|active.

methods.name: exchange_cancelOrder
methods.description: Cancel an active order (requires owner signature)
methods.returns: { orderId: integer, cancelled: true }

methods.name: exchange_getUserOrders
methods.description: All active orders for a trader address
methods.returns: array[{ orderId, side, pairId, price, amount, filled, remaining, status, ts }]

methods.name: exchange_getAuthNonce
methods.description: Get a challenge nonce for exchange login
methods.returns: { address, nonce: integer, expires_at: integer }

methods.name: exchange_login
methods.description: Authenticate to the exchange
methods.returns: { session_token: string, address: string, expires_at: integer }

methods.name: exchange_createApiKey
methods.description: Create a new API key for an authenticated account
methods.returns: { api_key: string, address: string, created_at: integer }

methods.name: exchange_listApiKeys
methods.description: List API keys for an account
methods.returns: array[{ key_id, label, created_at, last_used }]

methods.name: exchange_revokeApiKey
methods.description: Revoke an API key
methods.returns: { revoked: true, key_id: string }

methods.name: exchange_getBalance
methods.description: Get single-asset exchange balance for an address
methods.returns: { address, asset, balance: integer, hold: integer }

methods.name: exchange_getBalances
methods.description: Get all exchange balances for an address
methods.returns: { mode, assets: { OMNI: { balance, hold }, USDC: { balance, hold }, ... } }

methods.name: exchange_deposit
methods.description: Record a deposit to the exchange internal ledger
methods.returns: { deposit_id: string, address, asset, amount, status }

methods.name: exchange_depositReal
methods.description: Deposit on-chain funds to exchange escrow via confirmed TX
methods.returns: { deposit_id, address, amount, status }

methods.name: exchange_depositDemo
methods.description: Add demo/paper trading balance (testnet only)
methods.returns: { address, asset, added: integer, new_balance: integer }

methods.name: exchange_withdraw
methods.description: Withdraw from exchange internal ledger to on-chain address
methods.returns: { txid, address, asset, amount, status }

methods.name: exchange_getEscrowAddress
methods.description: Get the exchange escrow address for on-chain deposits
methods.returns: { escrow_address: string }

methods.name: pq_balance
methods.description: Balance + scheme info for a PQ address (any scheme prefix)
methods.returns: { address, scheme, code, address_prefix, balance }

methods.name: pq_send
methods.description: Send a transaction signed with any supported PQ scheme (codes 0-12, except vacation_kem/4)

params.name: id
params.description: TX id (must match what was signed)

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Unix seconds (must match what was signed)

methods.returns: { txid: string, status: 'accepted' }
methods.note: vacation_kem (code 4) cannot sign. ECDSA (code 0): standard secp256k1 sig. Codes 1-8: PQ native. Codes 9-12: ECDSA+PQ hybrid.

methods.name: pq_attestation
methods.description: Submit or verify a PQ attestation (login proof, vote, identity claim)
methods.returns: { verified: boolean, address, scheme, timestamp }

methods.name: identity_set
methods.description: Set on-chain identity metadata for an address
methods.returns: { address, alias, set_at_block: integer }

methods.name: identity_get
methods.description: Retrieve identity metadata for an address
methods.returns: { address, alias, email_hash, set_at_block } or null

methods.name: identity_search
methods.description: Search addresses by identity alias
methods.returns: array[{ address, alias }]

methods.name: kyc_getStatus
methods.description: Get KYC attestation level for an address
methods.returns: { address, level: integer, issuer, attested_at: integer, valid: boolean }

methods.name: kyc_attest
methods.description: Submit a KYC attestation (issuer-signed)
methods.returns: { attested: boolean, address, level, issuer }

methods.name: kyc_listIssuers
methods.description: List trusted KYC issuers
methods.returns: array[{ address, name, level_max: integer }]

methods.name: omnibus_getoracleprices
methods.description: All current oracle price feeds (median of exchange feeds)
methods.returns: { pair: { price_micro_usd, sources, timestamp } }

methods.name: omnibus_getallprices
methods.description: All prices from all connected exchange feeds (raw, not aggregated)
methods.returns: { exchange: { pair: price } }

methods.name: omnibus_getblockprices
methods.description: Oracle prices snapshot at a specific block height
methods.returns: { height, prices: { pair: price_micro_usd } }

methods.name: omnibus_getpricerange
methods.description: Price history for a pair over a block range
methods.returns: array[{ height, price_micro_usd, timestamp }]

methods.name: omnibus_getexchangefeed
methods.description: Raw price feeds from each connected exchange (Kraken, LCX, etc.)
methods.returns: { exchange: { pair: { bid, ask, last, timestamp } } }

methods.name: omnibus_getfxrate
methods.description: Fiat FX rates (USD/EUR etc.) from oracle aggregation
methods.returns: { rates: { EUR: number, GBP: number, ... }, timestamp: integer }

methods.name: omnibus_getorderbook
methods.description: Oracle-aggregated orderbook (composite across connected exchanges)
methods.returns: { pair, bids: [{ price, amount }], asks: [{ price, amount }] }

methods.name: omnibus_getarbitrage
methods.description: Current arbitrage opportunities detected between exchanges
methods.returns: array[{ pair, buy_exchange, sell_exchange, spread_pct, profit_est_usd }]

methods.name: omnibus_getbridgestatus
methods.description: OmniBus <-> external chain bridge status
methods.returns: { active: boolean, supported_chains: array, pending_transfers: integer }

methods.name: omnibus_getoraclepolicy
methods.description: Current oracle update policy (min sources, max staleness)
methods.returns: { min_sources: integer, max_age_seconds: integer, pairs: array }

methods.name: omnibus_setoraclepolicy
methods.description: Update oracle policy (admin only)
methods.returns: { updated: boolean, min_sources, max_age_seconds }

methods.name: omnibus_getminers
methods.description: All known miners and their recent block production stats
methods.returns: array[{ address, blocks_mined, last_block_height, hash_rate }]

methods.name: minersendtx
methods.description: Internal: miner-node broadcasts self-signed TX
methods.returns: { txid, status }

methods.name: getheaders
methods.description: Lightweight block headers for a height range (no TX data)
methods.returns: array[{ height, hash, prev_hash, timestamp, difficulty, nonce }]

websocket.description: WebSocket push events on port 8334 (local) or wss://omnibusblockchain.cc:8443/ws-testnet

events.name: new_tx
events.description: Emitted when a TX enters the mempool

events.name: new_trade
events.description: Emitted on every DEX fill (order match)

events.name: orderbook_update
events.description: Emitted after any orderbook change (place or cancel)

events.name: oracle_price
events.description: Emitted when an exchange oracle price is updated

events.name: ibd_progress
events.description: Emitted during Initial Block Download sync

events.name: heartbeat
events.description: Sent every 25 seconds to all clients
